name: Hermit
description: Hermetic tool management system for monorepos that installs per-project development tools without polluting the system PATH. Ensures all developers and CI use identical toolchain versions.

seo.title: Hermit — Monorepo & Build Systems
seo.meta_description: Hermit: Hermetic tool management system for monorepos that installs per-project development tools without polluting the system PATH. Ensures all developers and

when_to_use: Lock toolchain versions per project without system PATH pollution
Identical CLI tools across developer machines and CI
Bootstrap new developers with hermit activate
Monorepo tool isolation preventing version conflicts

pros: Per-project tool installs without polluting PATH
Ensures CI and devs use identical tool versions
Simple YAML config, no Nix or Docker needed
Lightweight install, works well in monorepos
cons: Narrower scope than Nix-based tools like devenv
No services like Postgres or Redis orchestration
Community and maintenance pace are modest
review.verdict: Pragmatic option when you only need reproducible CLI tool versions, not full environment reproducibility.
review.best_for: Monorepos wanting pinned CLI toolchains without adopting Nix
review.not_for: Teams needing reproducible services, databases, or full sandboxes
